title: stachys rudatisii
intro: Stachys rudatisii, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial herb native to South Africa, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, Wood Betony has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Stachys rudatisii include its ability to relieve anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, making it a popular remedy for stress relief and promoting a good night's sleep. Wood Betony is often prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used topically as a poultice or salve to alleviate skin conditions and wounds.
